description: Synthetic no-live-secret regression corpus for Agent Secret Guard. Cases must never be printed with source text by eval output.

provider:aws.description: Detect AWS secret access keys, Amazon Bedrock bearer API keys, and access-key identifiers only when paired nearby, while suppressing known documentation examples and standalone identifiers.

provider:openai.description: Detect OpenAI project and legacy-style API keys.

provider:anthropic.description: Detect Anthropic Claude API, Admin API, and Compliance API key prefixes.

provider:huggingface.description: Detect Hugging Face user access tokens.

provider:cloudflare.description: Detect Cloudflare's prefixed API key, user token, and account token formats.

provider:linear.description: Detect Linear API keys and OAuth access tokens.

provider:notion.description: Detect current Notion API tokens without relying on legacy bare secret_ matches.

provider:source-control.description: Detect GitHub credentials including classic/fine-grained PATs and App installation JWT tokens, plus GitLab token prefixes including personal, runner, deploy, impersonation, OAuth, trigger, feed, incoming mail, agent, workspace, service-account, and feature-flag tokens.

provider:collaboration.description: Detect Slack and Discord-style collaboration credentials.

provider:payments.description: Detect payment provider secret keys without flagging sandbox card numbers by default.

provider:email.description: Detect email provider API keys such as SendGrid and Resend.

provider:marketing.description: Detect marketing platform credentials such as Mailchimp API keys.

provider:supabase.description: Detect Supabase secret keys while suppressing documented publishable keys.

provider:observability.description: Detect observability platform credentials such as Datadog API/application keys and Grafana service-account tokens.

provider:communications.description: Detect communications platform credentials such as Twilio auth tokens while suppressing public SIDs.

provider:google.description: Detect Google API keys and Google OAuth client secrets.

provider:package-registry.description: Detect npm and PyPI publishing/install credentials while suppressing documentation placeholders.

provider:container-registry.description: Detect Docker Hub personal access tokens.

provider:secrets-management.description: Detect secret-manager service tokens such as HashiCorp Vault, Doppler, and 1Password service-account tokens.

provider:automation.description: Detect automation and code-analysis platform API keys such as Trigger.dev keys and SonarQube Cloud scoped organization tokens.

structured:credential-url.description: Detect URLs containing username and password credentials.

structured:json-sensitive-key.description: Detect credible secret-shaped values under sensitive JSON keys.

structured:assignment.description: Detect credible secret-shaped values in sensitive key assignments.

obfuscation:joined-literals.description: Detect secrets reconstructed from adjacent or concatenated string literals without flagging benign path literals.

obfuscation:multiline-reconstruction.description: Detect secrets reconstructed from shell line continuations and YAML block scalars without flagging benign prose or path blocks.

command:shell-leak-policy.description: Block shell commands that are likely to print or expose secrets.

command:secret-manager-policy.description: Block secret-manager reads while allowing key-name-only and runtime injection workflows.

negative:common-identifiers.description: Suppress common identifiers, hashes, UUIDs, and known safe public test data.

negative:placeholders-docs.description: Suppress short placeholders and documentation examples that resemble credential prefixes.

negative:path-listings.description: Suppress slash-delimited file paths and agent plugin cache paths in tool output listings.

negative:vcs-diff-prose-identifiers.description: Suppress prose, markdown, issue slugs, URL return paths, Sentry tag literals, public project identifiers, and timestamped filenames in VCS diffs.

provider:api-platform.description: Detect API platform credentials such as Postman API keys.

encoded:escapes.description: Detect secrets represented as contiguous hexadecimal, Unicode, or octal escape sequences.

encoded:html-entity.description: Detect secrets represented with HTML decimal or hexadecimal character entities.

encoded:percent.description: Detect secrets represented as fully percent-encoded byte runs outside URL context.

encoded:hex.description: Detect secrets represented as raw hexadecimal UTF-8 byte runs.

obfuscation:display-normalization.description: Detect secrets visually exposed through ANSI terminal escapes or Unicode format characters.

obfuscation:soft-wrap.description: Detect provider-shaped secrets split across terminal or log line wraps.

structured:json-object-key.description: Detect and redact secret material when it appears in JSON object keys, not only string values.

encoded:utf16-base64.description: Detect base64-wrapped UTF-16 text such as PowerShell EncodedCommand material.

obfuscation:chunked-token.description: Detect provider-shaped tokens split into same-line chunks by spaces, tabs, or colons.

negative:active-fp-recommendations.description: Suppress user-reported false positives from active guard recommendations while preserving true secret blocking.

negative:tool-output-generated-identifie.description: Suppress generated database and framework identifiers in command output when their shape is structural rather than credential material.

provider:openrouter.description: Detect OpenRouter API keys with stable sk-or versioned prefixes.

provider:perplexity.description: Detect Perplexity API keys with the pplx prefix.

provider:replicate.description: Detect Replicate API tokens with the r8_ prefix.

provider:cohere.description: Detect Cohere API keys in Cohere-specific key context.

path:sensitive-file.description: Block reads of known secret-bearing file paths while allowing committed env templates.

structured:jwt.description: Detect syntactically valid JSON Web Tokens while suppressing malformed JWT placeholders.

command:cloud-cli-secret-policy.description: Block cloud CLI commands that print access tokens or secret payloads while allowing metadata/list commands.

provider:cloud-platform.description: Detect cloud platform deployment tokens such as Fly.io access tokens while suppressing provider documentation prefixes and environment variable names.

provider:networking.description: Detect networking platform credentials such as Tailscale API keys, auth keys, OAuth client secrets, SCIM keys, and webhook keys while suppressing documentation prefixes and environment variable names.

provider:digitalocean.description: Detect DigitalOcean personal access tokens, OAuth access tokens, and OAuth refresh tokens while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:netlify.description: Detect Netlify authentication tokens with documented nfp, nfc, nfo, nfu, and nfb prefixes while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:buildkite.description: Detect Buildkite API, agent, cluster, package registry, portal access, and portal secret tokens with documented prefixes while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:circleci.description: Detect new-format CircleCI personal and project API tokens with CCIPAT_ and CCIPRJ_ prefixes while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:pulumi.description: Detect Pulumi Cloud access tokens with the pul- prefix and 40-hex body while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:atlassian.description: Detect Atlassian API tokens with the ATATT3 prefix and long structured body while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:shopify.description: Detect Shopify access tokens with documented prefixed forms and 32-hex bodies while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:planetscale.description: Detect PlanetScale service tokens, OAuth tokens, and database passwords with documented pscale prefixes while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:prefect.description: Detect Prefect Cloud user and service account API keys with documented pnu_ and pnb_ prefixes while suppressing documentation prefixes, placeholders, and environment variable names.

provider:heroku.description: Detect modern Heroku OAuth access tokens with the HRKU-AA prefix and 65-character structure while suppressing documentation prefixes and placeholders.

provider:airtable.description: Detect Airtable personal access tokens with the pat plus token-id and 64-hex body structure while suppressing documentation prose, environment variable names, and short placeholders.

provider:databricks.description: Detect Databricks personal access tokens with the dapi prefix, 32-hex body, and optional numeric suffix while suppressing documentation prose, environment variable names, and short placeholders.

provider:sourcegraph.description: Detect Sourcegraph access tokens with sgp_ prefixed structures while suppressing documentation prose, environment variable names, placeholders, and unprefixed hex strings.

provider:duffel.description: Detect Duffel test and live API access tokens with duffel_test_ and duffel_live_ prefixes plus bounded token bodies while suppressing documentation prefixes and placeholders.

provider:doppler.description: Detect Doppler service, personal, CLI, service-account, SCIM, and audit token prefixes.

provider:frameio.description: Detect Frame.io legacy developer/API bearer tokens with the fio-u- prefix.

provider:lob.description: Detect Lob API keys only in Lob-specific assignment or api.lob.com basic-auth contexts.

provider:mapbox.description: Detect Mapbox secret access tokens while keeping public pk tokens non-blocking.

provider:dropbox.description: Detect Dropbox short-lived access tokens only in Dropbox-specific assignment or OAuth bearer contexts while suppressing bare sl-prefixed strings, placeholders, and prose.

provider:launchdarkly.description: Detect LaunchDarkly API access tokens and server-side SDK keys with api-/sdk-prefixed UUIDv4 structure while suppressing public mobile keys, client-side IDs, placeholders, and prose.

provider:clojars.description: Detect Clojars deploy tokens with the CLOJARS_ prefix and 60-character lowercase alphanumeric body while suppressing documentation prose, short placeholders, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:cratesio.description: Detect crates.io API tokens with the cio prefix and 32-character alphanumeric body while suppressing old Cargo placeholder examples, prefix-only docs, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:xai.description: Detect xAI API keys with the xai- prefix and 80-character alphanumeric/underscore body while suppressing prefix-only prose, short placeholders, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:databento.description: Detect Databento API keys with the db- prefix and 32-character total length while suppressing prefix-only docs, short placeholders, repeated placeholders, and database-name prose.

provider:unkey.description: Detect Unkey root keys with the unkey_ prefix and an alphanumeric body while suppressing documentation placeholders, short examples, low-variety repeated placeholders, and non-root Unkey user-key examples.

provider:groq.description: Detect Groq API keys with the gsk_ prefix and an alphanumeric body while suppressing documentation placeholders, short examples, underscore-word placeholders, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:tavily.description: Detect Tavily API keys with the tvly- prefix and an alphanumeric body while suppressing documentation placeholders, env-var placeholder examples, short examples, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:nvidia.description: Detect NVIDIA API keys with the nvapi- prefix and 64-character token body while suppressing documentation placeholders, env-var placeholder examples, short examples, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:langsmith.description: Detect LangSmith personal and service API keys with lsv2_pt_ and lsv2_sk_ prefixes while suppressing documentation placeholders, short examples, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:jina.description: Detect Jina API keys with the jina_ prefix and exact 65-character total length while suppressing documentation placeholders, authorization-header placeholders, short examples, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:langfuse.description: Detect Langfuse secret keys with the sk-lf- prefix while suppressing public pk-lf- keys, documentation placeholders, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:pinecone.description: Detect Pinecone API keys with the pcsk_ prefix and a high-variety token body while suppressing documentation placeholders, short examples, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:ssemble.description: Detect Ssemble API keys with the sk_ssemble_ prefix and a high-variety token body while suppressing documentation placeholders, short examples, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:firecrawl.description: Detect Firecrawl API keys with the fc- dashless UUID format while suppressing documented placeholders, short examples, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:cursor.description: Detect observed Cursor API keys with the crsr_ user-key prefix and a high-variety token body while suppressing documentation placeholders, short examples, and low-variety repeated placeholders.

provider:openvsx.description: Detect Open VSX access tokens with ovsxat/ovsxp UUID formats while suppressing placeholders, dev config prefixes, all-zero UUIDs, and malformed UUID examples.

provider:pagarme.description: Detect Pagar.me encryption keys with ek_live_/ek_test_ environment prefixes and a high-variety random body while suppressing placeholders, short examples, repeated bodies, and Pagar.me API-key prefixes.

provider:qdrant.description: Detect Qdrant Cloud granular database API keys in Qdrant-specific assignments or request headers while suppressing documentation placeholders and prose about the documented eyJhb prefix.

provider:terraform.description: Detect Terraform Cloud/HCP Terraform API tokens containing the distinctive .atlasv1. segment with a 14-character prefix and 60-70 character credential body while suppressing masked examples, prose, short placeholders, and low-variety repeated bodies.

provider:azure-openai.description: Detect Azure OpenAI API keys only in Azure OpenAI-specific assignments or request contexts while suppressing placeholders, low-variety examples, and generic api-key headers without Azure context.

provider:bitrise.description: Detect Bitrise workspace API tokens with the bitwat_ prefix and a high-variety body while suppressing prefix-only documentation, short placeholders, repeated bodies, and Bitrise personal-access-token prose.

provider:inngest.description: Detect concrete Inngest API and signing credentials while suppressing official placeholders and event-key examples without a documented concrete token shape.

cases.description: AWS ECR get-login-password prints a registry password.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: GCP Secret Manager versions access prints secret payload bytes unless redirected.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure account get-access-token prints bearer token output.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Key Vault secret show can print secret values.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Container Registry expose-token returns an access token.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS ECR metadata listing is not secret material.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: GCP Secret Manager list command returns metadata, not payload bytes.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure account show returns account metadata, not access tokens.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure Key Vault secret list returns metadata, not secret values.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure ACR login without expose-token should not print a token.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: AWS ECR get-authorization-token returns registry authorization data.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS CodeArtifact get-authorization-token returns a repository authorization token.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS STS assume-role returns temporary access key, secret key, and session token material.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS STS get-session-token returns temporary access key, secret key, and session token material.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS SSO get-role-credentials returns temporary role credentials.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS configure export-credentials prints resolved AWS credentials.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Key Vault show-deleted can return a deleted secret value.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Storage account keys list returns storage access keys.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Storage account show-connection-string returns an account-key connection string.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Container Registry credential show returns registry login credentials.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Container Registry token credential generate returns token passwords.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Web App publishing credentials command returns deployment credentials.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Web App publishing profiles can return deployment credential material.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Function App publishing credentials command returns deployment credentials.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure Function App publishing profiles can return deployment credential material.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS STS caller identity returns principal metadata, not credential material.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: AWS CodeArtifact domain listing is metadata, not an authorization token.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: AWS configure list-profiles returns profile names only.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure Key Vault list-deleted returns deleted-secret metadata, not secret values.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure Storage account show returns account metadata, not access keys.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure Storage account list returns account metadata, not access keys.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure Container Registry show returns registry metadata, not credentials.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure ACR token show returns token metadata, not generated passwords.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure ACR token list returns token metadata, not generated passwords.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure Web App show returns app metadata, not publishing credentials.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure Function App show returns app metadata, not publishing credentials.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: gcloud service-account key creation writes the private key portion to a local file.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: gcloud beta service-account key creation has the same private-key write behavior.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS IAM create-access-key returns a one-time secret access key.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS IAM create-service-specific-credential returns generated service passwords or secrets.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: AWS IAM reset-service-specific-credential returns a new generated service password.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure service-principal creation emits credentials that must be protected.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure service-principal credential reset prints a new password or credential location.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: Azure app credential reset emits credentials that must be protected.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: gcloud service-account key list returns key metadata, not private key material.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: AWS IAM list-access-keys returns access key metadata without the secret access key.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: AWS IAM list-service-specific-credentials returns metadata without service passwords.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure service-principal listing returns metadata, not generated passwords.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure service-principal credential list returns credential metadata, not secret values.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: Azure app credential list returns metadata and does not retrieve password contents.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: gcloud auth print-access-token with a gcloud-wide flag still prints an access token.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: gcloud beta auth print-access-token is a documented token-printing variant.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: gcloud alpha auth print-identity-token is a documented token-printing variant.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: gcloud auth print-identity-token with service-account impersonation prints an identity token.
cases.label: positive

cases.description: gcloud auth list with a gcloud-wide flag lists accounts, not access tokens.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: gcloud beta auth list lists credentialed accounts, not token values.
cases.label: negative

cases.description: gcloud projects list returns resource metadata, not credential material.
cases.label: negative
